biological_replicate: six biological replicates of REEP1wt-mEm-3xHA, REEP1L107P-mEm-3xHA, or the parental control were collected for mass spectrometry analysis.
experimental_design: mutations in REEP1 and REEP2 cause Hereditary Spastic Paraplegia
